name: grp06/slop-janitor
summary: Codex app-server workflow runner organized around janitor, builder, and goal execution roles, with durable goal ledgers, clean-workspace gates, retry-safe snapshots, and checkpoint commits.
evidence: Defines janitor and builder stage topologies around candidate selection, ExecPlan creation/improvement, implementation, review, and parent meta-plan slice reconciliation.

Goal mode validates `.agent/goals/<id>/brief.md`, `goals.json`, and `ledger.jsonl`, drives Codex through `thread/goal/set/get/clear`, records lifecycle events, and only marks a goal complete after the thread goal reports `complete`.

The runner enforces clean managed repositories, validates required workflow artifacts and implementation completion, refuses unsupported approvals or interactive requests, and prevents retry when a failed stage leaves ambiguous workspace changes.
